heading: Limitation on active duty
label: 12737 Limitation on active duty
text: A member of the armed forces may not be ordered to active duty solely for the purpose of qualifying the member for retired pay under this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)133710:1036h.34:440p., .June 29, 1948, ch. 708, § 30962 Stat. 109010:1036h (1st sentence) and 34:440p (1st sentence) are omitted as surplusage. The words “member of the armed forces” are substituted for the word “person”, since only a member may be “ordered to active duty”.
Amendments1994— renumbered as this section and amended text generally, substituting “the member” for “him”.Pub. L. 103–337section 1337 of this title
